DiaExceptionNotificationOptions

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Models;

public sealed class DiaExceptionNotificationOptions
{
    public string SenderConfigKey { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    public string RecipientConfigKey { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    public string ErrorLogType { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    public string ProcessName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
}
